reasons: Atlas can group enemies into one area, giving Zhask's spawn and enhanced form a stronger zone to punish.
Zhask benefits when Atlas forces enemies to stay near the spawn's threat area.

proof.summary: Atlas groups enemies with Fatal Links, while Zhask punishes the grouped location with spawn pressure.
worksBestWhen: Zhask places or enhances the spawn near Atlas's pull area.
Atlas catches multiple targets instead of one tank.
failureCases: Zhask's spawn is placed too far away.
Atlas is interrupted before completing the pull.
Enemies kill or avoid the spawn before the combo starts.

reasons: Tigreal can push or knock enemies into a predictable area where Zhask's spawn can pressure them.
Zhask benefits when Tigreal controls enemies near a prepared spawn zone.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates the crowd-control area, while Zhask uses spawn damage and zoning to punish enemies stuck there.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal engages near Zhask's prepared spawn zone.
Zhask avoids placing the spawn too early in a bad position.
failureCases: Tigreal pushes enemies away from the spawn.
Zhask's spawn is destroyed before follow-up.
The enemy disengages after Tigreal's first control layer.

reasons: Grock's wall can restrict escape paths around Zhask's spawn.
Zhask benefits when Grock forces enemies to move through or remain near the spawn's threat area.

proof.summary: Grock limits enemy movement with terrain, while Zhask uses the restricted area for spawn-based pressure.
worksBestWhen: Grock walls enemies toward the spawn instead of away from it.
Zhask places the spawn where terrain control matters.
failureCases: Grock's wall blocks Zhask's team follow-up.
Enemies blink out of the zone.
Zhask's spawn is placed after enemies already escape.

reasons: Hylos can slow enemies and create frontline pressure around Zhask's spawn zone.
Zhask benefits when Hylos holds objective areas where the spawn can keep dealing damage.

proof.summary: Hylos keeps enemies pressured in the zone, while Zhask adds spawn damage and area denial.
worksBestWhen: Hylos fights near Zhask's spawn zone.
The team uses the combo around Turtle, Lord, turret, or choke points.
failureCases: Hylos fights outside Zhask's threat area.
Zhask's spawn is destroyed before the objective fight.
Enemies disengage and re-enter after Hylos's path expires.

reasons: Lolita can help protect Zhask while he sets up and plays around Nightmaric Spawn.
Zhask benefits from peel and protection because he needs time to control an area with spawn placement.

proof.summary: Zhask needs time and space to control an area with spawn placement, while Lolita provides peel and protection.
worksBestWhen: Lolita protects Zhask during setup before the fight starts.
Zhask positions behind the frontline instead of standing recklessly beside the spawn.
failureCases: Enemies dive from angles Lolita cannot cover.
Zhask places the spawn too far forward.
Lolita uses protection before the enemy poke or dive arrives.
